Figure 1. Overall framework of the proposed method. Given a large-scale simulation training set, we introduce a coreset sampling algorithm to select important and diverse samples, which are then augmented to realistic video strips and used for training.

Figure 2. Examples from LIBERO-Plus evaluation. The baseline VLA model fails under environment perturbations such as texture change (upper) and lighting change (lower), while the model trained with our augmented data performs the tasks correctly, showing stronger generalization.
